untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of presidential election cycle years (preelection year and election year), which is a calendar/macro event-based condition not expressible using price/technical indicators. The entry conditions 'Preelection year of presidential cycle' and 'Election year of presidential cycle' require external calendar logic or a dedicated election_cycle indicator that is not available in the allowed indicator list.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a calendar-based/macro trading rule dependent on US presidential election cycles (4-year pattern). It cannot be translated to technical indicator conditions. A practical implementation would require: (1) an external election_cycle indicator or calendar module, or (2) hardcoded date ranges for election/preelection years (1983-2010 data period suggests: buy in 1983-84, 1987-88, 1991-92, 1995-96, 1999-2000, 2003-04, 2007-08). The placeholder condition (close > sma_50) is a generic long bias; the actual election-year logic cannot be expressed with available indicators.
